Class ResearchPaper

java.lang.Object
kbtu.model.research.ResearchPaper
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<ResearchPaper>
public class ResearchPaper extends Object implements Serializable, Comparable<ResearchPaper>
Represents a published research paper within the university's research system. This class stores metadata compliant with IEEE standards and provides functionality for citation generation and h-index tracking.
See Also:

  • Method Details

    • getCitation

      public String getCitation(Format format)
      Generates a formatted citation string based on the specified format.
      Parameters:
      format - The desired citation style (e.g., BIBTEX or PLAIN_TEXT).
      Returns:
      A formatted string representing the paper's citation.

    • incrementCitations

      public void incrementCitations()
      Increments the citation count by one when the paper is referenced.

    • compareTo

      public int compareTo(ResearchPaper other)
      Compares this paper with another based on the number of citations. Provides natural ordering in descending order of citations.
      Specified by:
      compareTo in interface Comparable<ResearchPaper>
      Parameters:
      other - The other ResearchPaper to compare against.
      Returns:
      A negative integer, zero, or a positive integer as this paper has more, equal, or fewer citations than the specified paper.
